useCase.name: Social protection and cash transfers
useCase.problem: Benefits can miss eligible households when identity, social registries, eligibility rules, and payment systems do not work together.
useCase.outcome: A household can be identified, assessed, enrolled, paid, and given a way to challenge errors.

summary: Ethiopia: A household can be identified, assessed, enrolled, paid, and given a way to challenge errors.
